response.justification: Bogdan brings well over the required 6 years of fullstack experience, with recent, directly relevant work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS, plus hands-on AI-agent development (MCP code generators and agentic tooling) at his current role — a rare and explicitly required skill. His deep testing culture (TDD, test-framework authorship, testing workshops) and polyglot background match the role's engineering-quality emphasis. Gaps are mostly framework-specific: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest/Playwright experience, and Kotlin/Python are absent from his skill list, though his track record of picking up languages (D, Swift, C++, Java) suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React and MongoDB/AWS production work
Current hands-on AI-agent development experience (MCP generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Exceptional testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the role's primary backend framework
Kotlin and Python not listed; Java exposure appears dated (2016-2018)
React depth unclear — much of his frontend history is Ember.js
